## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / tooling
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's TypeScript strict-mode standards
- [ ] TSDoc added for any new public interfaces or classes
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] `tenant.config.schema.json` updated if new config fields were added
- [ ] `openapi.yaml` updated if new/changed API endpoints
- [ ] No breaking changes to `@tagmytaxi/shared` exports (or a migration path is documented)
- [ ] Linked issue: Closes #
